product_context.product_name: Trademark Search, Screening, and Brand Protection
product_context.one_line_value: Corsearch is the global leader in trademark clearance, brand protection, and IP

raw_research.deep_research_paste: Jordan Lee is a program manager in the operations division at Acme Consumer Brands. They are responsible for cross-functional project delivery including the ERP migration and the new product launch process. They have recently been looped into a project to streamline the trademark clearance workflow after the legal team flagged delays impacting launch timelines. Jordan has procurement authority for software tools under $100K annually and is coordinating vendor evaluations for the IP workflow improvement initiative.
raw_research.company_notes: Acme Consumer Brands is a mid-size FMCG company headquartered in Chicago with a portfolio of household cleaning, personal care, and food products sold across North America and Europe. They filed 12 trademark applications in 2024 across new SKU lines and recently flagged two potential conflicts in their European filing backlog. Their IP team is small (3 FTEs) and relies on outside counsel for screening.

offer_lock: Trademark Search, Screening, and Brand Protection
